title: Lower Grass Sides
description: Lowers the sides of all grass/nylium blocks!
body:
Lowers the sides of Grass, Snowy Grass, Grass Paths, Mycelium, Podzol, Warped Nylium, and Crimson Nylium!

![All changed blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ecmTBOSu/images/0d95c7b8269e2c45162ab89ec5f36cfa99af6ad3.png)

---

**Recommended to use with [BetterGrassify](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettergrassify) (or any better grass mod) so grass connects with other grass below it!**

---

Comparison:
![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ecmTBOSu/images/cedb9af153005555ad960f671f041f891c96d3c1.png)
